sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104065" key="*titanokto/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τῑτᾱνο-κτόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slaying Titans</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:281" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">281</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
